evals.prompt: Remove a spoken phrase from this project and keep its captions and downstream timing aligned.
evals.expected_output: Uses timeline cut, previews the change, refreshes IDs, and verifies affected frames.

evals.prompt: Fix two caption words and move the logo into the safe area without changing unrelated settings.
evals.expected_output: Loads bounded state, patches selected words and placement, then verifies rendered frames.
